canonicalSpecs.purpose: PC application root layout and backend-admin package naming.
Backend-admin runtime composition and backend SDK inventory.

integration.authority: Root SDKWork specs remain authoritative. Local specs may extend but must not contradict them.
integration.dependencyPolicy: Admin capability package registered through payment-pc-admin-core module registry.
integration.sdkPolicy: Generated backend SDK clients are injected through @sdkwork/payment-service boundaries; this package MUST NOT import @sdkwork/payment-backend-sdk generator transport directly. Admin controllers consume service.backend.intents / attempts / webhookEvents / reconciliationRuns trees only.
integration.languagePolicy: TypeScript packages follow workspace manifests while preserving the component contract.
